title: Ms Hansa Sachdeva: Overview, Role, and Research Interests
text:
Ms Hansa Sachdeva MBA, Honours in Economics, Doctoral Research Scholar
Hansa contributes to growth and transformative strategies in higher education through a cross-functional view of administration and business. She has earlier worked in Indian universities in roles spanning admissions, recruitment, outreach, scholarships and communication with a sharp focus on customer experience, service management and market leadership.
Role: Director, Admissions and Marketing Initiatives Planning
Department: University leadership
summary: Director of Admissions and Marketing Initiatives Planning at University of Southampton Delhi

title: Ms Hansa Sachdeva: Name Aliases and Alternate Spellings
text: Ms Hansa Sachdeva is a faculty member at University of Southampton Delhi. This person may also be referred to by the following names or spellings: Ms Hansa Sachdeva, Hansa Sachdeva, Ms. Hansa Sachdeva, Hansa S., Hansaa Sachdeva, Hansaa Sachdevah, Hanssa Sachdeva, Hansha Sachdeva. All of these names refer to the same individual.
summary: Alias resolution chunk for Ms Hansa Sachdeva. Lists all known alternate spellings and name variants to prevent retrieval errors caused by misspellings.
